title: genista numidica subsp. sarotes
intro: Genista numidica subsp. sarotes, also known as Sarotes Spiny Broom or Sarotes Broom, is a shrub species within the Fabaceae family, characterized by its thorny branches and yellow flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine, particularly in North Africa, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Genista numidica subsp. sarotes include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the management of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water to create teas or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
